action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline SAKT achieves AUC 0.7086 (val 0.7163) after 10 epochs, loss still decreasing. Low correct rate (19.6%) means class imbalance. Analysis: Model is underfitting - need longer training + LR scheduling. Class imbalance needs weighted loss. Can also increase model capacity. Decision: Rewrite with improved SAKT (deeper, weighted BCE loss, cosine LR, 30 epochs) and submit eval.
